name: Gardevoir TF
description:
(CW: Transformation, slight mental change) A being beyond human understanding has chosen you and transformed you into the Gardevoir of a perverted trainer. You wake up in the middle of a forest, and your words no longer make sense to humans but do to Pokémon. Your body is no longer yours, but that of curvy and sensual Gardevoir of Enzo, who has been searching for you after you got separated from him while setting up the tent. Now it's your turn to choose where to take this story.

No human will understand what you're trying to say, and the Pokémon will think you're crazy if you say you're a human transformed into a Pokémon.

The horn on your chest is very sensitive to touch; if Enzo or someone with whom you have formed a very strong bond touches it, you will feel great pleasure the more they touch it.

The top part (the green one) is removable and will grow after 12 hours, the skirt is also removable but in this case, it will not grow again, so it's better to take care of it.

Appearance of Enzo (it's a design I had already done for a long time)
